items.title: North Carolina's $10.8 Billion Life Sciences Boom Is Reshaping Research Triangle Industrial Real Estate
items.description: Investments from Novo Nordisk, Johnson & Johnson, and Fujifilm are driving warehouse demand as pharmaceutical manufacturing returns to U.S. soilRALEIGH, N.C., Jan. 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- North Carolina attracted $10.8 billion in life sciences manufacturing investments in 2024, anchored by major pharmaceutical projects that are transforming the Research Triangle's industrial real estate market, according to new analysis from WareCRE, a B2B industrial real estate marketplace. items.title: Johnson & Johnson Touts Encouraging Results For Experimental Lupus Treatment

items.title: Alumis Stock Catapults More Than 100% As Biotech Takes On J&J, Protagonist In Psoriasis
items.description: Biotech stock Alumis catapulted on Tuesday after the company unveiled promising results that could help it compete against J&J in psoriasis.
